name: security
description: OWASP security agents, security skills, and scan commands for vulnerability detection and security auditing.

agents.description: SQL injection, NoSQL injection, command injection detection
JWT security, OAuth2 flows, session management
RBAC, workspace isolation, privilege escalation prevention
Audit logging, security monitoring, SIEM integration
STRIDE, PASTA, attack trees, security requirements

commands.description: Full security scan with SIGIL + Claude

skills.description: OWASP scanning, differential review, false positive check, insecure defaults, sharp edges, supply chain audit, second opinion

token_impact: ~6 agent defs + 6 commands + 7 skill files — medium impact
